definitions.text: person som presenterer de opptredende og binder sammen numrene i en konsert, en revy eller lignende
definitions.translation: person who presents performers and links acts in a concert, revue, or similar event

definitions.text: person som leder radioprogram eller fjernsynssending
definitions.translation: person who hosts a radio program or television broadcast

definitions.text: person som annonserer program på fjernsyn
definitions.translation: person who announces programs on television
